name: Hypersign
tagline: Streamlining Web3 Compliance Through Crypto KYC

profile.vision: To provide privacy-first, decentralized, and reusable on-chain identity solutions that move the digital trust model from vulnerable data storage to secure proofs.
profile.mission: To empower Web3 projects, RWA protocols, and DeFi platforms with zero-knowledge based compliance tools that protect user privacy while meeting global regulatory standards.
profile.tone: Professional, technical, security-focused, and authoritative. The brand voice should sound like a trusted infrastructure partner that understands both deep cryptography and global compliance laws.
valuePropositions: Privacy-Centric: Powered by Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZKP) to verify users without exposing personal data.
Reusable KYC: Users verify once and reuse credentials across multiple platforms, reducing friction and cost.
Cross-Chain Compatibility: Onboard users on any protocol with modular SSI infrastructure.
Regulation Ready: Fully compliant with MiCA, AMLD7, and FATF requirements for VASPs.
Low Code Integration: Simple widget and SDK-based deployment for fast go-to-market.
coreOfferings: Know Your Customer (KYC) with Liveliness Check and Face Matching
Proof-of-Personhood (PoP) to prevent Sybil attacks and bots
Know Your Business (KYB) for institutional onboarding
Know Your Transaction (KYT) for wallet due diligence and AML monitoring

brandGuidelines.keyMessage: Identity is a proof, not a record. Move from storing PII to verifying credentials on-chain.
